scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/db.js && node --check src/auth.js
scripts.check:conflicts: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['.env.example','README.md','package.json','public/logo.svg','public/styles.css','src/auth.js','src/db.js','src/server.js'];const marker=/^(<{7}|={7}|>{7})/m;const bad=files.filter(f=>marker.test(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8')));if(bad.length){console.error('Conflict markers found in '+bad.join(', '));process.exit(1)}console.log('No conflict markers found in tracked conflict-prone files.');"
